summary: Completed testing of two-way feedback system. All 24 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - CoachingPage shows mentor cards with ratings, sessions count. Feedback form logic implemented correctly with proper time window checks (Join Now: 10min before to 15min after, Fill Feedback: 30min after session).

minor.issue: Returns 404 for mock mentor user because mock mentor has no mentor profile in DB. Real mentors work correctly.

critical_code_review_comments: Feedback system correctly implements two-way feedback: candidate-to-mentor (CoachingPage) and mentor-to-candidate (MentorDashboard)
Time window logic is correct: Join Now appears 10min before to 15min after session, Fill Feedback appears 30min after session
Rating aggregation updates mentor/candidate average ratings after feedback submission
Check-in API correctly returns meeting link and records check-in timestamp
Bookings API returns feedback_submitted status fields for both candidate and mentor feedback
data-testid attributes present on mentor cards and feedback buttons for testing
seed_data_creation: None - no test bookings created as it requires coaching plan with sessions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Feedback system fully implemented. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_feedback_system.py cover all feedback endpoints. To test E2E feedback flow, need to: 1) Create a user with coaching sessions, 2) Book a session, 3) Wait for session time window, 4) Test Join Now and Fill Feedback buttons. Mock users don't have coaching sessions by default.

candidate_to_mentor_feedback_endpoint.details: POST /api/feedback/candidate-to-mentor - validates booking ownership, rating ranges (1-5), prevents duplicate submissions

mentor_to_candidate_feedback_endpoint.details: POST /api/feedback/mentor-to-candidate - validates mentor role, case type enum, rating ranges, prevents duplicate submissions

session_checkin_endpoint.details: POST /api/sessions/{booking_id}/check-in - validates booking ownership, time window, returns meet_link

session_status_endpoint.details: GET /api/sessions/{booking_id}/status - returns check-in status for both mentor and candidate

bookings_feedback_status.details: GET /api/mentors/bookings/my - returns candidate_feedback_submitted and mentor_feedback_submitted fields

mentor_rating_aggregation.details: Mentors list includes rating field calculated from candidate feedbacks

coaching_page_ui.details: CoachingPage shows mentor cards with data-testid, ratings, sessions count, expertise tags

join_now_button_logic.details: isSessionJoinable() correctly checks 10min before to 15min after window

fill_feedback_button_logic.details: isSessionPastJoinWindow() correctly checks 30min after session start

mocked_apis.note: All feedback APIs are real implementations with MongoDB persistence
